subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O my God! Thanks be unto Thee O my Beloved!... O ye friends of God! The joy and happiness of the people of faithfulness
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد و لک الشکر علی ما انعمت و آتیت و والیت و اعطیت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @sacred remains; burial of the Bab, @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @unity; oneness of humanity, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant
